title: Crystals Overhauled
description: Adds beautiful crystals to the game, each with its own set of tools and armor.
body:
Crystals Overhauled: Make your Minecraft Gameplay "Crystal Clear"

This mod introduces nine stunning crystals: citrine, malachite, rhodochrosite, sapphire, heliodor, peridotite, onyx, azurite, and celestite. Crystals can be iron, diamond or netherite tier. Each crystal offers its own set of upgraded tools and armor, adding depth and variety to your Minecraft experience.

The tools can be crafted by taking a tool/armor piece of the material that corresponds with the crystal's tier and surrounding it with 8 crystal shards. For example, to craft a sapphire pickaxe, which is diamond tier, you have to take a diamond pickaxe and surround it with 8 sapphire shards.

Crystal specifications:

- OLD v1.x specifications:

 - Citrine Crystal: 

            - gives you STRENGHT potion effect when wearing a full citrine armor set;

            - the tools and armor have very high durability but can't mine netherite;

            - the items are immune to fire & lava;

            - can be found between y levels 1 and 57.

 - Malachite Crystal: 

            - gives you STRENGHT potion effect when wearing a full malachite armor set;

            - the tools have increased attack damage;

            - can be found between y levels 1 and 45.

 - Sapphire Crystal: 

            - gives you WATER BREATHING & DOLPHIN'S GRACE potion effects when wearing a full malachite armor set;

            - the tools have highly increased attack damage;

            - can be found between y levels -64 and 16.

 - Rhodochrosite Crystal: 

            - the tools have highly increased attack speeds;

            - can be found between y levels -50 and 10, most likely at level -23.

 - Celestite Crystal: 

            - the armor has highly increased protection;

            - can be found between y levels 1 and 46.

 - Heliodor Crystal: 

            - each armor piece that is equipped gives you 1 xp every 5 minutes (a full set gives you 4 xp every 5 minutes);

            - can be found between y levels 40 and 200.

 - Peridotite Crystal: 

            - the armor has very high knockback resistance;

            - the tools have a HUGE enchantability (2x bigger than the netherite or gold one);

            - can be found between y levels -64 and 0.

 - Onyx Crystal: 

            - the leggings give you permanent speed;

            - can be found between y levels 10 and 37 (it's the rarest crystal in the mod).

 

- NEW v2.x specifications:

 - Citrine Crystal: 

            - diamond tier

            - gives you STRENGHT potion effect when wearing a full citrine armor set;

            - the tools and armor have very high durability;

            - the items are immune to fire & lava;

            - can be found between y levels 1 and 57.

 - Malachite Crystal: 

            - iron tier

            - gives you STRENGHT potion effect when wearing a full malachite armor set;

            - the tools have increased attack damage;

            - can be found between y levels 1 and 45.

 - Sapphire Crystal: 

            - diamond tier

            - gives you WATER BREATHING & DOLPHIN'S GRACE potion effects when wearing a full malachite armor set;

            - the tools have highly increased attack damage;

            - can be found between y levels -64 and 16.

 - Rhodochrosite Crystal: 

            - diamond tier

            - the tools have highly increased attack speeds;

            - can be found between y levels -50 and 10, most likely at level -23.

 - Celestite Crystal: 

            - iron tier

            - the armor has highly increased protection;

            - can be found between y levels 1 and 46.

 - Heliodor Crystal: 

            - iron tier

            - each armor piece that is equipped gives you 1 xp every 5 minutes (a full set gives you 4 xp every 5 minutes);

            - can be found between y levels 40 and 200.

 - Peridotite Crystal: 

            - diamond tier

            - the armor has high knockback resistance;

            - the leggings give you permanent speed;

            - the tools have a HUGE enchantability (2x bigger than the netherite or gold one);

            - can be found between y levels -64 and 0.

 - Azurite Crystal: 

            - netherite tier

            - the tools have very high efficiency;

            - the tools have a 5% chance of giving the attacked entity the WEAKNESS potion effect for 5.5 seconds;

 

            - can be found in the nether.

 - Onyx Crystal: 

            - netherite tier

            - its basically improved netherite;

            - can be found in the end very rarely (it's the rarest crystal in the mod).

 

Advancements: 

            - "Crystal Clear" - get a crystal shard;

            - "Wait, is this lava?" - get a citrine shard;

            - "Secrets of the Sapphire" - get a sapphire shard;

            - "Sparkling Discovery" - get a rhodochrosite shard;

            - "Mystic Malachite" - get a malachite shard;

            - "Celestial Voyager" - get a celestite shard.

            - "Helios' Blessing" - get a heliodor shard.

            - "Peridotite Prospector" - get a peridotite shard.

            - "Onyx Hunter" - get an onyx shard.

Endless Possibilities Await 

We are working on expanding the crystal collection, so stay tuned for the latest updates!

Feel free to add this to your modpack!
Note: Only the 1.19.x and 1.20.1 versions are supported and will receive updates!
The fabric version requires Fabric Api!

Note: For this mod to work on the Quilt modloader, it requires the Quilted Fabric Api (QFAPI) to be installed.
